Keep changes minimal - just add the entries and update the percentage.

# MMS Implementation Plan

> **Status**: Archived completed tasks on 2026-01-21, keeping active work only
> **Last Updated**: 2026-01-21
> **Overall Completion**: ~88%
> **Archive Location**: `ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/2026-01-21/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN_FULL.md`

---

## Verification Summary (2026-01-21)

| Component | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| Database Schema | âś… Complete (40+ tables, 27 enums) |
| Shared Library | âś… Complete (27 files, 308+ tests) |
| Domain Services | âś… Complete (20 services, 700+ tests) |
| API Layer | âś… 98% (90+ endpoints + WebSocket Hub) |
| Workers | âś… All 9 production-ready |
| TypeScript Optimizer | âś… Complete (669 tests) |
| C++ Optimizer | âś… Binary compiled (arm64) |
| Frontend | âś… Canvas 5/5, Layout 4/4, Overlays 4/4 |
| State Management | âś… @belt/tools (6 slices) |
| Operations | âś… Complete (Docker + K8s + CI + Grafana + Alerts) |
| Demo | đź”„ In progress (~55%) |

---

## đź”´ BLOCKERS

None currently blocking.

---

## âš ď¸Ź IN PROGRESS

### Phase 8: Operations âś… COMPLETE
- **Docker**: âś… COMPLETE (5/5 Dockerfiles + docker-compose.yml)
- **Kubernetes**: âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21) - Full k8s/ directory with 15 manifests
- **CI/CD**: âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21) - Full GitHub Actions pipeline
- **Observability**: âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21) - 6 dashboards + 25 alerting rules

---

## đź“‹ NEXT UP (Priority Order)

### P2 (High) - Phase 8: Operations

1. ~~**Kubernetes Manifests** (spec 008)~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - Created `k8s/` directory with 15 manifest files
   - Namespace, ConfigMap, Secrets (+ External Secrets template)
   - Deployments: backend, frontend, worker, optimizer, file-watcher
   - Services, Ingress with TLS + WebSocket support
   - HPA for autoscaling (backend 3-10, worker 3-10)
   - NetworkPolicies (default-deny + explicit allows)
   - PVCs for storage (inbox, archive, errors, exports)

2. ~~**CI/CD Pipeline** (GitHub Actions)~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - Created `.github/workflows/` with 3 workflow files
   - CI: lint, typecheck, test, build, security scan
   - CD: Docker build/push, staging/production deploy
   - PR checks: validation, size limits, affected tests
   - Supporting: CODEOWNERS, PR template, Dependabot, labeler

3. ~~**Grafana Dashboards** (spec 008)~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - Created `monitoring/grafana/` with 6 dashboard JSON files
   - Fleet Overview, PM Schedule, Optimizer Performance
   - API Health, Worker Queue, Drift Analysis

4. ~~**Alerting Rules** (spec 008)~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - Created `monitoring/prometheus/alerts.yml` with 25 rules
   - Created `monitoring/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml`
   - Prometheus scrape config for Kubernetes

### P3 (Medium) - Phase 9: Demo

5. ~~**Demo Data Generator** (spec 009)~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - 128-train fleet across 3 fleets (ML/Kawasaki, AEL/CAF, TCL/CRRC)
   - 5 years historical mileage data (last 90 days detailed readings)
   - PM history with cold-start algorithm
   - Bow-wave scenario generator (Chaos Monkey)
   - CLI tool: `--trains, --history, --bow-wave, --seed, --output, --json`
   - 24 tests passing

6. ~~**Bow-Wave Scenario** (spec 009)~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - PM projection algorithm for future scheduling (mileage + time dual triggers)
   - Peak C4 concentration detection (month and quarter)
   - 40% overlap violation flag with capital risk calculation
   - Monthly density heatmap data (>15 PMs/month = critical)
   - Gantt bar data for tactical visualization
   - Man-hour capacity analysis with overload percentage
   - Risk level assessment (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL)
   - CLI `--analyze` and `--horizon` flags
   - 28 tests passing, 52 total demo tests

### P3 (Medium) - UI Polish

7. ~~**Modal Dialogs**~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - PublishBaselineModal, CreateScenarioModal, RunOptimizerModal
   - Uses @belt/tools modal.data for form state, connected to toolbar buttons

8. ~~**Minimap Component**~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - Canvas overview navigation with compressed 10-year timeline
   - Viewport indicator showing current visible region
   - Clickable navigation with real-time sync
   - Density heatmap using PM data (monthly aggregation)
   - Toggle in Overlays menu (also grid toggle added)
   - 15 unit tests

9. ~~**Accessibility Polish**~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast utilities (contrast.ts)
   - Theme-aware accessible colors with automatic alternatives
   - Contrast ratio calculation (luminance-based)
   - Accessible color palette generation
   - 49 tests passing

---

## Critical Path

~~Database~~ â†’ ~~Shared Lib~~ â†’ ~~Domain Services~~ â†’ ~~Optimizers~~ â†’ ~~API~~ â†’ ~~Integration~~ â†’ ~~UI~~ â†’ ~~Operations~~ â†’ **Demo (next)**

---

## Implementation Notes

### Key Specifications
| Spec | Status |
|------|--------|
| 001-executive-summary.md | âś… Reviewed |
| 002-architecture.md | âś… 100% |
| 003-database-schema.md | âś… 100% |
| 004-domain-services.md | âś… 100% |
| 005-api.md | âś… 98% |
| 006-user-interface.md | âś… 90% |
| 007-integration.md | âś… 90% |
| 008-operations.md | âś… 100% |
| 009-demo-application.md | đź”„ ~55% |

### Constraints Reference
- **@belt/tools**: Use createSchema/createType for validation
- **State**: @belt/tools machines (React hooks BLOCKED)
- **Commits**: No Co-Authored-By lines
- **Database**: Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB
- **API**: Hono framework with OpenAPI spec
- **Workers**: BullMQ with Redis
- **UI**: React 18 + deck.gl + BlueprintJS v6

---

## Session Log

### 2026-01-21
- Archived completed tasks (1831 lines â†’ ~150 lines)
- Archive location: `ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/2026-01-21/`
- âś… Kubernetes manifests complete (15 files in k8s/) - Tagged v0.0.102
- âś… CI/CD pipeline complete (7 files in .github/) - Tagged v0.0.103
- âś… Grafana dashboards + Alerting rules complete (10 files in monitoring/) - Tagged v0.0.104
- **Phase 8 Operations: COMPLETE**
- âś… Demo Data Generator complete (128 trains, 3 fleets, 5yr history, CLI tool, 24 tests)
- âś… Bow-Wave Scenario Analyzer complete (PM projection, peak detection, visualization data, 28 tests) - Tagged v0.0.106
- âś… Modal Dialogs complete (PublishBaselineModal, CreateScenarioModal, RunOptimizerModal) - Uses @belt/tools modal.data for form state
- âś… Minimap Component complete (10-year timeline, density heatmap, viewport indicator, clickable navigation, 15 tests)
- âś… Accessibility Polish complete - contrast.ts with WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, theme-aware color alternatives, 49 tests - Tagged v0.0.109
- âś… CSV Import Parser complete (src/demo/csv-import.ts) - Fleet Roster, PM History, PM Rules CSVs per spec 009 Section 9.2.1, 42 tests passing
- âś… Sample CSV files complete (public/sample-data/) - 30 trains, 51 PM records, 15 PM rules, all validated - Tagged v0.0.111

# MMS Implementation Plan

> **Status**: Archived completed tasks on 2026-01-21, keeping active work only
> **Last Updated**: 2026-01-21
> **Overall Completion**: ~88%
> **Archive Location**: `ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/2026-01-21/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN_FULL.md`

---

## Verification Summary (2026-01-21)

| Component | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| Database Schema | âś… Complete (40+ tables, 27 enums) |
| Shared Library | âś… Complete (27 files, 308+ tests) |
| Domain Services | âś… Complete (20 services, 700+ tests) |
| API Layer | âś… 98% (90+ endpoints + WebSocket Hub) |
| Workers | âś… All 9 production-ready |
| TypeScript Optimizer | âś… Complete (669 tests) |
| C++ Optimizer | âś… Binary compiled (arm64) |
| Frontend | âś… Canvas 5/5, Layout 4/4, Overlays 4/4 |
| State Management | âś… @belt/tools (6 slices) |
| Operations | âś… Complete (Docker + K8s + CI + Grafana + Alerts) |
| Demo | đź”„ In progress (~65%) |

---

## đź”´ BLOCKERS

None currently blocking.

---

## âš ď¸Ź IN PROGRESS

### Phase 8: Operations âś… COMPLETE
- **Docker**: âś… COMPLETE (5/5 Dockerfiles + docker-compose.yml)
- **Kubernetes**: âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21) - Full k8s/ directory with 15 manifests
- **CI/CD**: âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21) - Full GitHub Actions pipeline
- **Observability**: âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21) - 6 dashboards + 25 alerting rules

---

## đź“‹ NEXT UP (Priority Order)

### P2 (High) - Phase 8: Operations

1. ~~**Kubernetes Manifests** (spec 008)~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - Created `k8s/` directory with 15 manifest files
   - Namespace, ConfigMap, Secrets (+ External Secrets template)
   - Deployments: backend, frontend, worker, optimizer, file-watcher
   - Services, Ingress with TLS + WebSocket support
   - HPA for autoscaling (backend 3-10, worker 3-10)
   - NetworkPolicies (default-deny + explicit allows)
   - PVCs for storage (inbox, archive, errors, exports)

2. ~~**CI/CD Pipeline** (GitHub Actions)~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - Created `.github/workflows/` with 3 workflow files
   - CI: lint, typecheck, test, build, security scan
   - CD: Docker build/push, staging/production deploy
   - PR checks: validation, size limits, affected tests
   - Supporting: CODEOWNERS, PR template, Dependabot, labeler

3. ~~**Grafana Dashboards** (spec 008)~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - Created `monitoring/grafana/` with 6 dashboard JSON files
   - Fleet Overview, PM Schedule, Optimizer Performance
   - API Health, Worker Queue, Drift Analysis

4. ~~**Alerting Rules** (spec 008)~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - Created `monitoring/prometheus/alerts.yml` with 25 rules
   - Created `monitoring/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml`
   - Prometheus scrape config for Kubernetes

### P3 (Medium) - Phase 9: Demo

5. ~~**Demo Data Generator** (spec 009)~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - 128-train fleet across 3 fleets (ML/Kawasaki, AEL/CAF, TCL/CRRC)
   - 5 years historical mileage data (last 90 days detailed readings)
   - PM history with cold-start algorithm
   - Bow-wave scenario generator (Chaos Monkey)
   - CLI tool: `--trains, --history, --bow-wave, --seed, --output, --json`
   - 24 tests passing

6. ~~**Bow-Wave Scenario** (spec 009)~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - PM projection algorithm for future scheduling (mileage + time dual triggers)
   - Peak C4 concentration detection (month and quarter)
   - 40% overlap violation flag with capital risk calculation
   - Monthly density heatmap data (>15 PMs/month = critical)
   - Gantt bar data for tactical visualization
   - Man-hour capacity analysis with overload percentage
   - Risk level assessment (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL)
   - CLI `--analyze` and `--horizon` flags
   - 28 tests passing, 52 total demo tests

### P3 (Medium) - UI Polish

7. ~~**Modal Dialogs**~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - PublishBaselineModal, CreateScenarioModal, RunOptimizerModal
   - Uses @belt/tools modal.data for form state, connected to toolbar buttons

8. ~~**Minimap Component**~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - Canvas overview navigation with compressed 10-year timeline
   - Viewport indicator showing current visible region
   - Clickable navigation with real-time sync
   - Density heatmap using PM data (monthly aggregation)
   - Toggle in Overlays menu (also grid toggle added)
   - 15 unit tests

9. ~~**Accessibility Polish**~~ âś… COMPLETE (2026-01-21)
   - WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast utilities (contrast.ts)
   - Theme-aware accessible colors with automatic alternatives
   - Contrast ratio calculation (luminance-based)
   - Accessible color palette generation
   - 49 tests passing

---
